zh.lifeSummary: 當John Norton於1330年出生在英國貝德福爾斯特亞特利 煙雨 沙沙時，他的父親Norville Norton28歲，母親Avelina de Neville23歲。他於1351年與Joan Bassingbourne在英國貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1365年在英國享年35歲。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Norton was born in 1330, in Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Norville Norton, was 28 and his mother, Avelina de Neville, was 23. He married Joan Bassingbourne in 1351, in Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1365, in England, at the age of 35.

Il a épousé Joan Bassingbourne en 1351, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1365, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

Er hat 1351 in Bedfordshire, England Joan Bassingbourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1365 im Alter von 35 Jahren in England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Nortonが1330年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアストレアトリー ウィス シャルペンhオシャルペンhオで生まれた時，父Norville Nortonは28歳，母Avelina de Nevilleは23歳であった。1351年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでJoan Bassingbourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1365年にイギリスで35歳で死去した。

ko.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호

ko.lifeSummary: John Norton(이)가 1330년 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Norville Norton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Avelina de Neville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1351년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 Joan Bassingbourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1365년 영국에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Norton nasceu em 1330, em Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Norville Norton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Avelina de Neville, tinha 23 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Norton родился в 1330 г. в местности шарпено, стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Norville Norton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Avelina de Neville, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Bassingbourne в 1351 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1365 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 35 лет.
